title: Polish Potato Salad with Crispy Peppercorns
description: A hearty potato salad with a twist of peppery flavor and crispy texture, perfect for a side dish or light lunch.
instructions: Boil the diced potatoes in salted water until tender.
Drain the potatoes and let them cool to room temperature.
In a large bowl, whisk together the mayonnaise and dill pickle relish (if using).
Add the cooled potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the mayonnaise mixture.
Sprinkle the crispy peppercorns over the top of the potatoes and toss to combine.
Season the salad with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill and serve.
